userStories.title: Establish Baseline & Analyze Metrics
userStories.description: Run the platform grader benchmark (benchmark/run_platform_grader.py) to get initial metrics. Analyze the `benchmark/reports/final_platform_grade.json` to identify bottlenecks in speed, accuracy, or efficiency.
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark run completes successfully without errors.
Current F1, Throughput, and Cost metrics are logged.

userStories.title: Optimize Concurrency & Reliability
userStories.description: Improve `src/parallel_batch_processor.py` to handle rate limits (429s) and timeouts better. Implement adaptive concurrency or backoff strategies if missing. Ensure fallback providers are used effectively.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero API timeouts or crashes during full benchmark run.
Rate limit errors are handled gracefully without crashing.

userStories.title: Optimize Token Efficiency
userStories.description: Refine prompts in `src/extraction_pipeline.py` or `src/prompt_builder.py` to reduce token usage per pick. Remove unnecessary context or compress instructions.
acceptanceCriteria: Accuracy (F1 Score) remains > 95% despite shorter prompts.

userStories.title: Final Polish & Verification
userStories.description: Run the full benchmark suite one last time. Ensure all metrics meet the target goals. Clean up any debug logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Codebase is clean and strictly typed.
